// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  STATE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const STORAGE_KEY_USER = 'aerosol_tracker_user';
let currentUser = null;
let tasks = [];
let settings = { syncUrl:'', syncKey:'' };
let currentMachine = null;
let showCompleted = false;
let editingId = null;
let ctxMenu = null;
let pendingDelete = null;
let activityLog = [];
const MAX_LOG = 100;

function uid(){ return 't' + Date.now() + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6); }

function sanitizeTasks(){
  let changed = false;
  tasks.forEach(t => {
    const resp = (t.responsible || '').trim();
    const rem = (t.remarks || '').trim();
    if ((rem === 'Arsalan' || rem === 'Saqib') && (resp !== 'Arsalan' && resp !== 'Saqib')) {
      t.responsible = rem;
      t.remarks = resp;
      changed = true;
    }
    if (t.responsible === undefined || t.responsible === null) {
      t.responsible = '';
      changed = true;
    }
  });
  return changed;
}

function loadState(){
  try {
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    if(raw){
      const d = JSON.parse(raw);
      tasks    = d.tasks    || [];
      settings = d.settings || { syncUrl:'', syncKey:'' };
      if(!tasks.length || tasks.length <= 128) seedTasks();
    } else { seedTasks(); }
  } catch(e){ seedTasks(); }
  
  if (sanitizeTasks()) {
    saveState();
  }
}

function seedTasks(){
  tasks = SEED.map(s => ({
    id: uid(), machine: s[0], category: s[1], desc: s[2],
    priority: s[3], progress: s[4], status: s[5], responsible: s[6] || '', remarks: s[7] || '', updated: ''
  }));
  sanitizeTasks();
  saveState();
}

function saveState(){
  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ tasks, settings }));
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  COLLAPSIBLE FILTERING SYSTEM
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const PRIORITY_SORT = {High:0,Medium:1,Low:2};
const STATUS_SORT = {'In Progress':0,'Not Started':1,'Pending Procurement':2,'Completed':3};

function toggleFilterBar(){
  const bar = document.getElementById('filter-bar');
  const btn = document.getElementById('filter-toggle-btn');
  if(bar.style.display === 'flex' || bar.classList.contains('show')){
    bar.style.display = 'none';
    bar.classList.remove('show');
    btn.classList.remove('active');
  } else {
    bar.style.display = 'flex';
    bar.classList.add('show');
    btn.classList.add('active');
  }
}

function filterByStatus(status){
  const select = document.getElementById('ff-status');
  if(select){
    select.value = status;
    applyFilters();
  }
}

function resetFilters(){
  clearFilters();
}

function updateFilterBadge(){
  const f = getFilters();
  let count = 0;
  if(f.search) count++;
  if(f.machine) count++;
  if(f.status) count++;
  if(f.priority) count++;
  if(f.category) count++;
  if(f.responsible) count++;
  if(f.sort) count++;
  
  const badge = document.getElementById('filter-active-badge');
  if(badge){
    if(count > 0){
      badge.textContent = count;
      badge.style.display = 'block';
    } else {
      badge.style.display = 'none';
    }
  }
}

function getFilters(){
  return {
    search: (document.getElementById('f-search').value||'').toLowerCase().trim(),
    machine: document.getElementById('ff-machine').value,
    status: document.getElementById('ff-status').value,
    priority: document.getElementById('ff-priority').value,
    category: document.getElementById('ff-category').value,
    responsible: document.getElementById('ff-responsible').value,
    sort: document.getElementById('ff-sort').value
  };
}

function filterTasks(arr){
  const f = getFilters();
  let result = arr;
  if(f.search){
    result = result.filter(t => t.desc.toLowerCase().includes(f.search) || (t.remarks||'').toLowerCase().includes(f.search) || (t.responsible||'').toLowerCase().includes(f.search));
  }
  if(f.machine) result = result.filter(t => t.machine === f.machine);
  if(f.status) result = result.filter(t => t.status === f.status);
  if(f.priority) result = result.filter(t => t.priority === f.priority);
  if(f.category) result = result.filter(t => t.category === f.category);
  if(f.responsible) result = result.filter(t => t.responsible === f.responsible);
  // Sort
  if(f.sort === 'priority'){
    result = [...result].sort((a,b) => (PRIORITY_SORT[a.priority]??9) - (PRIORITY_SORT[b.priority]??9));
  } else if(f.sort === 'progress'){
    result = [...result].sort((a,b) => b.progress - a.progress);
  } else if(f.sort === 'status'){
    result = [...result].sort((a,b) => (STATUS_SORT[a.status]??9) - (STATUS_SORT[b.status]??9));
  }
  return result;
}

function activeFilterCount(){
  const f = getFilters();
  let c = 0;
  if(f.search) c++;
  if(f.machine) c++;
  if(f.status) c++;
  if(f.priority) c++;
  if(f.category) c++;
  if(f.responsible) c++;
  return c;
}

function applyFilters(){ updateFilterBadge(); renderAll(); updateFilterUI(); }

function clearFilters(){
  document.getElementById('f-search').value = '';
  document.getElementById('ff-machine').value = '';
  document.getElementById('ff-status').value = '';
  document.getElementById('ff-priority').value = '';
  document.getElementById('ff-category').value = '';
  document.getElementById('ff-responsible').value = '';
  document.getElementById('ff-sort').value = '';
  applyFilters();
}

function updateFilterUI(){
  const c = activeFilterCount();
  const btn = document.getElementById('filter-clear-btn');
  if(btn) btn.style.display = c > 0 ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
  const info = document.getElementById('filter-info');
  const filtered = filterTasks(tasks);
  if(info){
    if(c > 0){
      info.textContent = `${filtered.length} of ${tasks.length} tasks`;
    } else {
      info.textContent = `${tasks.length} tasks`;
    }
  }
}

function populateFilterDropdowns(){
  // Machines
  const mSel = document.getElementById('ff-machine');
  if(mSel){
    const mVal = mSel.value;
    mSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Machines</option>';
    MACHINE_ORDER.forEach(m => {
      const ct = tasks.filter(t => t.machine === m).length;
      if(ct > 0) mSel.innerHTML += `<option value="${m}">${m} (${ct})</option>`;
    });
    mSel.value = mVal;
  }
  // Responsible
  const rSel = document.getElementById('ff-responsible');
  if(rSel){
    const rVal = rSel.value;
    const ppl = [...new Set(tasks.map(t => t.responsible).filter(Boolean))].sort();
    rSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Responsible</option>';
    ppl.forEach(p => rSel.innerHTML += `<option>${p}</option>`);
    rSel.value = rVal;
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  NAVIGATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function navigate(view, machine){
  clearSelection();
  document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('view-' + view).classList.add('active');
  if(view === 'detail' && machine){ showMachine(machine); }
  if(view === 'settings'){ renderActivityLog(); }
  if(view !== 'detail'){ currentMachine = null; }
  window.scrollTo({ top:0, behavior:'smooth' });
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  RENDER KPIs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderKPIs(){
  const ft = filterTasks(tasks);
  const c = s => ft.filter(t => t.status === s).length;
  
  let overall = 0;
  if(ft.length > 0) {
    const totalProg = ft.reduce((sum, t) => sum + (Number(t.progress) || 0), 0);
    overall = Math.round(totalProg / ft.length);
  }
  
  const activeStatus = document.getElementById('ff-status').value;
  highlightKPI(activeStatus);
  
  animCount('k-total', ft.length);
  animCount('k-done',  c('Completed'));
  animCount('k-ip',    c('In Progress'));
  animCount('k-pp',    c('Pending Procurement'));
  animCount('k-ns',    c('Not Started'));
}

function highlightKPI(status){
  const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.kpi');
  cards.forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
  
  if(!status){
    const totalCard = document.querySelector('.kpi.total');
    if(totalCard) totalCard.classList.add('active');
  } else {
    let cls = '';
    if(status === 'Completed') cls = '.kpi.done';
    else if(status === 'In Progress') cls = '.kpi.inprog';
    else if(status === 'Pending Procurement') cls = '.kpi.procure';
    else if(status === 'Not Started') cls = '.kpi.notstarted';
    
    if(cls){
      const card = document.querySelector(cls);
      if(card) card.classList.add('active');
    }
  }
}

function animCount(id, target){
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  const cur = parseInt(el.textContent) || 0;
  if(cur === target){ el.textContent = target; return; }
  let v = cur;
  const step = Math.ceil(Math.abs(target - cur) / 30);
  const dir = target > cur ? 1 : -1;
  const t = setInterval(() => {
    v = dir > 0 ? Math.min(v + step, target) : Math.max(v - step, target);
    el.textContent = v;
    if(v === target) clearInterval(t);
  }, 28);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  RENDER DASHBOARD
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderDashboard(){
  const grid = document.getElementById('machines-grid');
  const taskList = document.getElementById('dashboard-task-list');
  const labelText = document.getElementById('dashboard-label-text');
  const C = 2 * Math.PI * 15.9;

  const filtered = filterTasks(tasks);

  if(activeFilterCount() > 0){
    grid.style.display = 'none';
    taskList.style.display = 'flex';
    taskList.innerHTML = '';
    if(labelText) labelText.textContent = `Filtered Tasks (${filtered.length} found)`;
    
    if(!filtered.length){
      taskList.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No tasks match your filters</div>';
    } else {
      filtered.forEach(t => {
        taskList.appendChild(buildTask(t, true));
      });
    }
  } else {
    grid.style.display = 'grid';
    taskList.style.display = 'none';
    if(labelText) labelText.textContent = 'Machine Sections — Tap to view tasks';
    
    grid.innerHTML = '';
    MACHINE_ORDER.forEach((m, i) => {
      const mt = filtered.filter(t => t.machine === m);
      if(mt.length === 0 && activeFilterCount() > 0) return;
      const allMt = tasks.filter(t => t.machine === m);
      if(allMt.length === 0) return;
      
      const done    = mt.filter(t => t.status === 'Completed').length;
      const pending = mt.length - done;
      const pct     = mt.length ? Math.round(done/mt.length*100) : 0;
      const ePend   = mt.filter(t => t.category === 'Electrical' && t.status !== 'Completed').length;
      const mPend   = mt.filter(t => t.category === 'Mechanical' && t.status !== 'Completed').length;
      const gPend   = mt.filter(t => t.category === 'General' && t.status !== 'Completed').length;
      const dash    = `${(pct/100*C).toFixed(1)} ${C.toFixed(1)}`;

      const card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'machine-card';
      card.style.setProperty('--i', i);
      card.onclick = () => navigate('detail', m);
      card.innerHTML = `
        <div class="card-top">
          <div class="card-icon">${ICONS[m]||'🔧'}</div>
          <div class="ring-wrap">
            <svg class="ring-svg" viewBox="0 0 36 36">
              <circle class="ring-track" cx="18" cy="18" r="15.9"/>
              <circle class="ring-fill" cx="18" cy="18" r="15.9" stroke-dasharray="0 ${C.toFixed(1)}" data-dash="${dash}"/>
            </svg>
            <div class="ring-num">${pct}%</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-name">${m}</div>
        <div class="card-tags">
          ${ePend ? `<span class="ctag e">⚡ ${ePend}</span>` : ''}
          ${mPend ? `<span class="ctag m">⚙ ${mPend}</span>` : ''}
          ${gPend ? `<span class="ctag g">📋 ${gPend}</span>` : ''}
          ${!pending ? `<span class="ctag done">✓ Complete</span>` : ''}
        </div>
        <div class="card-bar"><div class="card-bar-fill" style="width:0%" data-pct="${pct}%"></div></div>
        <div class="card-foot">
          <span class="card-pend">${pending ? pending+' remaining' : done+' done'}</span>
          <span class="card-arrow">→</span>
        </div>`;
      grid.appendChild(card);
    });

    if(!grid.children.length){
      grid.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No machines match your filters</div>';
    }

    requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      grid.querySelectorAll('.ring-fill').forEach(el => el.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray', el.dataset.dash));
      grid.querySelectorAll('.card-bar-fill').forEach(el => el.style.width = el.dataset.pct);
    }));
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  RENDER MACHINE DETAIL
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function showMachine(m){
  currentMachine = m;
  showCompleted = false;
  document.getElementById('toggle-btn').className = 'toggle-btn';
  document.getElementById('toggle-btn').innerHTML = '<div class="toggle-dot"></div>Show Completed';
  document.getElementById('d-icon').textContent = ICONS[m] || '🔧';
  document.getElementById('d-name').textContent = m;

  const mt = tasks.filter(t => t.machine === m);
  const done = mt.filter(t => t.status === 'Completed').length;
  const pct  = mt.length ? Math.round(done/mt.length*100) : 0;
  const fill = document.getElementById('d-fill');
  fill.style.width = '0%';
  document.getElementById('d-pct').textContent = `${pct}% · ${done}/${mt.length}`;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => fill.style.width = pct + '%'));

  // Gallery — HIDE by default, show button if photos exist
  const gal = document.getElementById('detail-gallery');
  const allImgs = getAllMachinePhotos(m);
  
  const photosBtn = document.getElementById('photos-toggle-btn');
  if(allImgs.length){
    photosBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';
    photosBtn.classList.remove('on');
    photosBtn.innerHTML = '<div class="toggle-dot"></div>📷 View Photos (' + allImgs.length + ')';
  } else {
    photosBtn.style.display = 'none';
  }
  gal.style.display = 'none';
  gal.innerHTML = '';
  
  renderDetail();
}

function togglePhotos(){
  const gal = document.getElementById('detail-gallery');
  const btn = document.getElementById('photos-toggle-btn');
  const m = currentMachine;
  if(!m) return;
  
  if(gal.style.display === 'flex'){
    gal.style.display = 'none';
    btn.classList.remove('on');
    btn.innerHTML = '<div class="toggle-dot"></div>📷 View Photos (' + getAllMachinePhotos(m).length + ')';
  } else {
    const allImgs = getAllMachinePhotos(m);
    gal.style.display = 'flex';
    gal.innerHTML = allImgs.map(img => `<div class="gallery-img-wrap" onclick="openLightbox('${img}')"><img src="${img}" alt="${m}" onerror="this.parentElement.style.display='none';"></div>`).join('');
    btn.classList.add('on');
    btn.innerHTML = '<div class="toggle-dot"></div>📷 Hide Photos';
  }
}

function getAllMachinePhotos(m){
  const machineImgs = MACHINE_IMAGES[m] || [];
  const taskImgs = tasks.filter(t => t.machine === m && t.image).map(t => t.image);
  return [...machineImgs, ...taskImgs];
}

function renderDetail(){
  const body = document.getElementById('detail-body');
  body.innerHTML = '';
  const m = currentMachine;

  ['Electrical','Mechanical','General'].forEach(cat => {
    const catTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.machine === m && t.category === cat);
    if(!catTasks.length) return;
    const visible  = showCompleted ? catTasks : catTasks.filter(t => t.status !== 'Completed');
    const pending  = catTasks.filter(t => t.status !== 'Completed').length;
    const catCls   = cat === 'Electrical' ? 'e' : cat === 'Mechanical' ? 'm' : 'g';
    const icon     = cat === 'Electrical' ? '⚡' : cat === 'Mechanical' ? '⚙' : '📋';

    const sec = document.createElement('div');
    sec.className = 'cat-section';
    sec.innerHTML = `
      <div class="cat-header ${catCls}">
        <span>${icon}</span>
        <span class="cat-name">${cat}</span>
        <span class="cat-count">${pending} pending · ${catTasks.length} total</span>
      </div>
      <div class="task-list" id="tl-${catCls}"></div>`;
    body.appendChild(sec);

    const list = sec.querySelector(`#tl-${catCls}`);
    if(!visible.length){
      list.innerHTML = `<div class="empty">All ${cat} tasks completed ✓</div>`;
      return;
    }
    visible.forEach(t => list.appendChild(buildTask(t)));
  });
}

function buildTask(t, showMachineName = false){
  const sc  = STATUS_CLASS[t.status] || 'ns';
  const pct = Math.round(t.progress);
  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.className = `task-card s-${sc}`;
  div.dataset.id = t.id;
  div.onclick = () => openEditModal(t.id);
  const pfill = pct===100?'full':pct===0?'':'';
  div.innerHTML = `
    <div class="task-top">
      ${isLoggedIn() ? `<input type="checkbox" class="task-select-cb" data-id="${t.id}" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); handleCheckboxChange()" style="margin-right: 0.6rem; cursor: pointer; width: 16px; height: 16px; accent-color: var(--accent); flex-shrink: 0; align-self: center;">` : ''}<div class="task-desc">${t.desc}</div>
      <div class="task-badges">
        ${showMachineName ? `<span class="badge" style="background:var(--s-pp-bg);color:var(--s-pp-t);border:1px solid var(--s-pp-b)">🏭 ${t.machine}</span>` : ''}
        ${t.responsible ? `<span class="badge" style="background:var(--g-bg);color:var(--g-t);border:1px solid var(--g-b)">👤 Responsible: ${t.responsible}</span>` : ''}
        ${t.lastEditedBy ? `<span class="badge" style="background:var(--s-ip-bg);color:var(--s-ip-t);border:1px solid var(--s-ip-b)">✏️ ${t.lastEditedBy}</span>` : ''}
        ${t.priority && t.priority !== '–' ? `<span class="badge p-${t.priority}">${t.priority}</span>` : ''}
        <span class="badge s-${sc}">${t.status}</span>
        ${isLoggedIn() ? `<button class="task-menu-btn" style="color: #f87171" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); confirmDelete('${t.id}')" title="Delete Task">🗑</button>` : ''}
        <button class="task-menu-btn" onclick="openCtx(event,'${t.id}')">⋯</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="task-prog-row">
      <div class="task-prog-track"><div class="task-prog-fill ${pfill}" style="width:${pct}%"></div></div>
      <span class="task-pct">${pct}%</span>
    </div>
    ${t.remarks ? `<div class="task-remarks">${t.remarks}</div>` : ''}
    ${t.updated  ? `<div class="task-updated">Updated ${t.updated}</div>` : ''}`;
  return div;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  CONTEXT MENU
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function openCtx(e, id){
  e.stopPropagation();
  closeCtx();
  const menu = document.createElement('div');
  menu.className = 'ctx-menu';
  menu.id = 'ctx-menu';
  menu.innerHTML = `
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="openEditModal('${id}')">✏️ Edit Task</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="quickStatus('${id}','Completed')">✅ Mark Completed</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="quickStatus('${id}','In Progress')">🔄 Mark In Progress</div>
    <div class="ctx-item danger" onclick="confirmDelete('${id}')">🗑 Delete</div>`;
  const rect = e.target.getBoundingClientRect();
  menu.style.top  = Math.min(rect.bottom + 4, window.innerHeight - 200) + 'px';
  menu.style.right = (window.innerWidth - rect.right) + 'px';
  document.body.appendChild(menu);
  ctxMenu = menu;
  setTimeout(() => document.addEventListener('click', closeCtx, {once:true}), 10);
}
function closeCtx(){ if(ctxMenu){ ctxMenu.remove(); ctxMenu = null; } }

function quickStatus(id, status){
  if(!isLoggedIn()){ openLoginModal(); return; }
  const t = tasks.find(t => t.id === id);
  if(!t) return;
  t.status = status;
  if(status === 'Completed') t.progress = 100;
  t.lastEditedBy = isLoggedIn() ? currentUser.name : 'Unknown';
  t.updated = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-PK',{day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'});
  logActivity(`Changed status of "${t.desc.slice(0, 30)}..." on ${t.machine} to "${status}"`);
  saveState(); renderAll(); toast('Status updated — ' + status,'success');
}

function confirmDelete(id){
  if(!isLoggedIn()){ openLoginModal(); return; }
  pendingDelete = id;
  const t = tasks.find(t => t.id === id);
  const desc = t ? t.desc : '';
  const mach = t ? t.machine : '';
  logActivity(`Deleted task "${desc.slice(0, 30)}..." from ${mach}`);
  const toastEl = showUndoToast(t ? `"${t.desc.slice(0,40)}…" deleted` : 'Task deleted');
  tasks = tasks.filter(t => t.id !== id);
  saveState(); renderAll();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  MODAL — ADD / EDIT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function populateMachineSelect(selected){
  const sel = document.getElementById('f-machine');
  sel.innerHTML = MACHINE_ORDER.map(m => `<option${m===selected?' selected':''}>${m}</option>`).join('');
}

function toggleModalFields(readOnly) {
  document.getElementById('f-machine').disabled = readOnly;
  document.getElementById('f-category').disabled = readOnly;
  document.getElementById('f-desc').disabled = readOnly;
  document.getElementById('f-priority').disabled = readOnly;
  document.getElementById('f-status').disabled = readOnly;
  document.getElementById('f-progress').disabled = readOnly;
  document.getElementById('f-remarks').disabled = readOnly;
  document.getElementById('f-responsible').disabled = readOnly;
  
  const imgInput = document.getElementById('f-image');
  if (imgInput) imgInput.disabled = readOnly;
  
  const saveBtn = document.querySelector('.btn-save');
  if (saveBtn) saveBtn.style.display = readOnly ? 'none' : 'inline-flex';
  
  const deleteBtn = document.getElementById('modal-delete-btn');
  if (deleteBtn) {
    if (readOnly) {
      deleteBtn.style.display = 'none';
    } else {
      deleteBtn.style.display = editingId ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
    }
  }
}

function openAddModal(machine){
  if(!isLoggedIn()){ openLoginModal(); return; }
  editingId = null;
  document.getElementById('modal-title').textContent = 'Add Task';
  toggleModalFields(false);
  populateMachineSelect(machine || currentMachine || 'General');
  document.getElementById('f-category').value  = 'Mechanical';
  document.getElementById('f-desc').value      = '';
  document.getElementById('f-priority').value  = 'Medium';
  document.getElementById('f-status').value    = 'Not Started';
  document.getElementById('f-progress').value  = 0;
  document.getElementById('f-remarks').value   = '';
  document.getElementById('f-responsible').value = '';
  document.getElementById('f-image').value     = '';
  document.getElementById('f-image-preview').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('prog-display').textContent = '0%';
  document.getElementById('prog-num').textContent = '0%';
  document.getElementById('task-modal').style.display = 'flex';
}

function openEditModal(id){
  const t = tasks.find(t => t.id === id);
  if(!t) return;
  editingId = id;
  const isWritable = isLoggedIn();
  document.getElementById('modal-title').textContent = isWritable ? 'Edit Task' : 'View Task (Read-Only)';
  
  populateMachineSelect(t.machine);
  document.getElementById('f-category').value  = t.category;
  document.getElementById('f-desc').value      = t.desc;
  document.getElementById('f-priority').value  = t.priority === '–' ? 'Medium' : t.priority;
  document.getElementById('f-status').value    = t.status;
  document.getElementById('f-progress').value  = t.progress;
  document.getElementById('f-remarks').value   = t.remarks;
  document.getElementById('f-responsible').value = t.responsible || '';
  document.getElementById('f-image').value     = '';
  if(t.image){
    document.getElementById('f-image-img').src = t.image;
    document.getElementById('f-image-preview').style.display = 'block';
  } else {
    document.getElementById('f-image-preview').style.display = 'none';
  }
  document.getElementById('prog-display').textContent = t.progress + '%';
  document.getElementById('prog-num').textContent = t.progress + '%';
  
  toggleModalFields(!isWritable);
  
  document.getElementById('task-modal').style.display = 'flex';
}

document.getElementById('f-progress').addEventListener('input', function(){
  document.getElementById('prog-num').textContent = this.value + '%';
});

function closeModal(){
  document.getElementById('task-modal').style.display = 'none';
  editingId = null;
}

function optimizeImage(file) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(e) {
      const img = new Image();
      img.onload = function() {
        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        let width = img.width;
        let height = img.height;
        const maxDim = 1024;
        
        if (width > maxDim || height > maxDim) {
          if (width > height) {
            height = Math.round((height * maxDim) / width);
            width = maxDim;
          } else {
            width = Math.round((width * maxDim) / height);
            height = maxDim;
          }
        }
        
        canvas.width = width;
        canvas.height = height;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
        
        // Convert to quality 0.7 JPEG
        const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.7);
        resolve(dataUrl);
      };
      img.onerror = reject;
      img.src = e.target.result;
    };
    reader.onerror = reject;
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
}

async function saveTask(){
  const machine  = document.getElementById('f-machine').value;
  const category = document.getElementById('f-category').value;
  const desc     = document.getElementById('f-desc').value.trim();
  if(!desc){ toast('Task description is required','error'); return; }
  const priority = document.getElementById('f-priority').value;
  const status   = document.getElementById('f-status').value;
  const progress = parseInt(document.getElementById('f-progress').value);
  const remarks  = document.getElementById('f-remarks').value.trim();
  const responsible = document.getElementById('f-responsible').value.trim();
  const updated  = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-PK',{day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'});

  let imagePath = null;
  if(editingId) {
    const existingTask = tasks.find(t => t.id === editingId);
    if (existingTask) imagePath = existingTask.image || null;
  }

  const fileInput = document.getElementById('f-image');
  if(fileInput.files.length > 0){
    try {
      const file = fileInput.files[0];
      toast('Optimizing image...','info');
      const base64Data = await optimizeImage(file);
      const filename = `task_img_${Date.now()}.jpg`;
      toast('Uploading optimized image...','info');
      imagePath = await uploadImageToGitHub(base64Data, filename, machine);
      toast('Image uploaded successfully','success');
    } catch(e) {
      toast('Image upload failed: ' + e.message,'error');
      return;
    }
  }

  const lastEditedBy = isLoggedIn() ? currentUser.name : 'Unknown';
  if(editingId){
    const t = tasks.find(t => t.id === editingId);
    Object.assign(t, {machine,category,desc,priority,status,progress,remarks,responsible,updated,lastEditedBy,image:imagePath});
    logActivity(`Updated task "${desc.slice(0,30)}..." on ${machine}`);
    toast('Task updated ✓','success');
  } else {
    tasks.push({id:uid(),machine,category,desc,priority,progress,status,remarks,responsible,updated,lastEditedBy,image:imagePath});
    logActivity(`Added task "${desc.slice(0,30)}..." to ${machine}`);
    toast('Task added ✓','success');
  }
  closeModal();
  saveState();
  if(editingId || machine === currentMachine){ currentMachine = machine; }
  renderAll();
  if(currentMachine) navigate('detail', currentMachine);
}

function deleteCurrentTask(){
  if(!isLoggedIn()){ openLoginModal(); return; }
  if(!editingId) return;
  const t = tasks.find(t => t.id === editingId);
  const desc = t ? t.desc : '';
  const mach = t ? t.machine : '';
  logActivity(`Deleted task "${desc.slice(0,30)}..." from ${mach}`);
  tasks = tasks.filter(t => t.id !== editingId);
  closeModal(); saveState(); renderAll();
  toast('Task deleted','info');
  if(currentMachine) renderDetail();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  TOGGLE COMPLETED
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleDone(){
  showCompleted = !showCompleted;
  const btn = document.getElementById('toggle-btn');
  if(showCompleted){ btn.classList.add('on'); btn.innerHTML='<div class="toggle-dot"></div>Hide Completed'; }
  else             { btn.classList.remove('on'); btn.innerHTML='<div class="toggle-dot"></div>Show Completed'; }
  renderDetail();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  EXCEL IMPORT / EXPORT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function triggerImport(){ document.getElementById('import-input').click(); }

function importExcel(input){
  const file = input.files[0];
  if(!file) return;
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = e => {
    const wb   = XLSX.read(new Uint8Array(e.target.result), {type:'array'});
    const ws   = wb.Sheets['TRACKER'];
    if(!ws){ toast('TRACKER sheet not found in file','error'); return; }
    const rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(ws, {header:1, defval:''});
    const imported = rows.slice(2).filter(r => r[1] && String(r[1]).trim()).map(r => {
      let machine = String(r[1]).trim();
      if (machine === 'decoration  Oven') machine = 'Decoration Oven';
      else if (machine === 'Lacquer oven') machine = 'Lacquer Oven';
      else if (machine === 'Auto strapping machine') machine = 'Auto Strapping Machine';
      else if (machine === 'Overall Machine operation') machine = 'Overall Machine Operation';

      return {
        id:       uid(),
        machine:  machine,
        category: String(r[2]).trim(),
        desc:     String(r[3]).trim(),
        priority: String(r[4]).trim() || '–',
        progress: Math.round((parseFloat(r[5])||0) * (parseFloat(r[5])<=1?100:1)),
        status:   String(r[6]).trim(),
        responsible: r[7] ? String(r[7]).trim() : '',
        remarks:  r[8] ? String(r[8]).trim() : '',
        updated:  r[9] ? String(r[9]).trim() : ''
      };
    });
    if(!imported.length){ toast('No tasks found in file','error'); return; }
    tasks = imported;
    sanitizeTasks();
    saveState(); renderAll();
    toast(`${imported.length} tasks imported ✓`,'success');
  };
  reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
  input.value = '';
}

function exportExcel(){
  const rows = [
    ['AEROSOL PLANT  ·  INSTALLATION TRACKER', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '← Dashboard'],
    ['#', 'Machine', 'Category', 'Task Description', 'Priority', 'Progress', 'Status', 'Responsible', 'Remarks', 'Updated']
  ];
  tasks.forEach((t,i) => rows.push([
    i+1,
    t.machine,
    t.category,
    t.desc,
    t.priority,
    t.progress/100,
    t.status,
    t.responsible || '',
    t.remarks || '',
    t.updated || ''
  ]));
  const ws = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(rows);
  ws['!cols'] = [{wch:4},{wch:18},{wch:13},{wch:54},{wch:10},{wch:11},{wch:20},{wch:15},{wch:38},{wch:14}];
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, 'TRACKER');
  XLSX.writeFile(wb, `Aerosol_Tracker_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}.xlsx`);
  toast('Excel exported ✓','success');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  GITHUB SYNC
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const GH = { owner:'ckndr', repo:'Aerosol', branch:'main', file:'tasks.json' };
const GH_RAW  = `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${GH.owner}/${GH.repo}/${GH.branch}/${GH.file}`;
const GH_API  = `https://api.github.com/repos/${GH.owner}/${GH.repo}/contents/${GH.file}`;
let syncBusy  = false;
let syncQueue = false;

function saveSync(){
  settings.syncKey  = document.getElementById('sync-key-input').value.trim();
  settings.autoSync = document.getElementById('auto-sync-toggle').checked;
  saveState(); updateSyncUI();
  toast('Sync settings saved','success');
}

function toggleAutoSync(el){
  settings.autoSync = el.checked;
  saveState(); updateSyncUI();
}

async function testSync(){
  const key = document.getElementById('sync-key-input').value.trim();
  setSyncStatus('pending','● Testing…','Testing connection…');
  try {
    const h = {'Accept':'application/vnd.github.v3+json'};
    if(key) h['Authorization'] = 'token ' + key;
    const r = await fetch(GH_API, {headers:h});
    if(r.ok){
      setSyncStatus('ok','● Connected','GitHub connection successful ✓');
      toast('GitHub connection successful ✓','success');
    } else if(r.status===404){
      // File doesn't exist yet — that's OK for first push
      setSyncStatus('ok','● Ready','Repo found. tasks.json will be created on first push.');
      toast('Repo found — ready to push','success');
    } else {
      setSyncStatus('err','● Error','HTTP ' + r.status + ' — check token permissions');
      toast('Connection failed — HTTP ' + r.status,'error');
    }
  } catch(e){
    setSyncStatus('err','● Offline','Could not reach GitHub — check internet');
    toast('Connection failed — ' + e.message,'error');
  }
}

async function pushToGitHub(){
  const key = settings.syncKey;
  if(!key){ toast('Add a GitHub token in Settings first','error'); navigate('settings'); return; }
  if(syncBusy){ syncQueue = true; return; }
  syncBusy = true;
  setSyncStatus('pending','● Syncing…','Pushing to GitHub…');
  try {
    // Get current SHA (needed to update existing file)
    let sha = null;
    const metaR = await fetch(GH_API, {
      headers:{'Authorization':'token '+key,'Accept':'application/vnd.github.v3+json'}
    });
    if(metaR.ok){ const meta = await metaR.json(); sha = meta.sha; }

    const payload = JSON.stringify({ tasks, settings:{ autoSync: settings.autoSync }, activityLog: activityLog.slice(0, 50) }, null, 2);
    const encoded = btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(payload)));
    const body    = {
      message: 'Update tasks · ' + new Date().toLocaleString('en-PK'),
      content:  encoded,
      branch:   GH.branch
    };
    if(sha) body.sha = sha;

    const r = await fetch(GH_API, {
      method: 'PUT',
      headers:{'Authorization':'token '+key,'Content-Type':'application/json','Accept':'application/vnd.github.v3+json'},
      body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });
    if(r.ok){
      setSyncStatus('ok','● Synced','Last push: ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString());
      toast('Pushed to GitHub ✓','success');
    } else {
      const err = await r.json().catch(()=>({}));
      setSyncStatus('err','● Push failed', err.message || ('HTTP ' + r.status));
      toast('Push failed — ' + (err.message || r.status),'error');
    }
  } catch(e){
    setSyncStatus('err','● Push failed',e.message);
    toast('Push failed — ' + e.message,'error');
  }
  syncBusy = false;
  if(syncQueue){ syncQueue = false; pushToGitHub(); }
}

async function pullFromGitHub(){
  setSyncStatus('pending','● Pulling…','Fetching from GitHub…');
  try {
    const key = settings.syncKey || (currentUser && currentUser.token);
    const headers = {};
    if(key) {
      headers['Authorization'] = 'token ' + key;
      headers['Accept'] = 'application/vnd.github.v3+json';
      const r = await fetch(GH_API + '?t=' + Date.now(), { headers });
      if(!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status);
      const meta = await r.json();
      const content = decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(meta.content)));
      const data = JSON.parse(content);
      if(Array.isArray(data.tasks) && data.tasks.length){
        tasks = data.tasks;
        sanitizeTasks();
        if(Array.isArray(data.activityLog)){
          activityLog = data.activityLog;
          try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY+'_log', JSON.stringify(activityLog)); } catch(e){}
        }
        saveState(); renderAll();
        setSyncStatus('ok','● Synced','Pulled ' + tasks.length + ' tasks from GitHub');
        toast('Pulled ' + tasks.length + ' tasks from GitHub ✓','success');
      } else {
        toast('No tasks found in GitHub file','error');
        setSyncStatus('err','● Pull failed','No tasks in tasks.json');
      }
    } else {
      const r = await fetch(GH_RAW + '?t=' + Date.now());
      if(!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status);
      const data = await r.json();
      if(Array.isArray(data.tasks) && data.tasks.length){
        tasks = data.tasks;
        sanitizeTasks();
        if(Array.isArray(data.activityLog)){
          activityLog = data.activityLog;
          try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY+'_log', JSON.stringify(activityLog)); } catch(e){}
        }
        saveState(); renderAll();
        setSyncStatus('ok','● Synced','Pulled ' + tasks.length + ' tasks from GitHub');
        toast('Pulled ' + tasks.length + ' tasks from GitHub ✓','success');
      } else {
        toast('No tasks found in GitHub file','error');
        setSyncStatus('err','● Pull failed','No tasks in tasks.json');
      }
    }
  } catch(e){
    setSyncStatus('err','● Pull failed',e.message);
    toast('Pull failed — ' + e.message,'error');
  }
}

async function uploadImageToGitHub(base64Data, filename, machineName){
  const key = settings.syncKey || (currentUser && currentUser.token);
  if(!key) throw new Error("GitHub token required to upload images.");
  
  // Sanitize machine name for folder path
  const safeFolder = (machineName || 'General').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _-]/g, '').trim();
  const path = `Photos/${safeFolder}/${filename}`;
  const apiUri = `https://api.github.com/repos/${GH.owner}/${GH.repo}/contents/${path}`;
  
  const payload = {
    message: `Upload photo for ${machineName} · ${filename}`,
    content: base64Data.split(',')[1],
    branch: GH.branch
  };
  
  const r = await fetch(apiUri, {
    method: 'PUT',
    headers: {
      'Authorization': 'token ' + key,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'Accept': 'application/vnd.github.v3+json'
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(payload)
  });
  
  if(!r.ok) {
    const err = await r.json().catch(() => ({}));
    throw new Error(err.message || `HTTP ${r.status}`);
  }
  
  return path;
}

function setSyncStatus(type, dot, text){
  const d = document.getElementById('sync-status-dot');
  const t = document.getElementById('sync-status-text');
  if(!d||!t) return;
  d.className = 'sync-status ' + type;
  d.textContent = dot;
  t.textContent = text;
}

function updateSyncUI(){
  const key  = settings.syncKey || '';
  const auto = settings.autoSync || false;
  const ki   = document.getElementById('sync-key-input');
  const at   = document.getElementById('auto-sync-toggle');
  if(ki) ki.value = key;
  if(at) at.checked = auto;
  if(key){
    setSyncStatus('ok','● Configured','Token saved · repo: github.com/'+GH.owner+'/'+GH.repo);
  } else {
    setSyncStatus('err','● Local only','Add a GitHub token to enable team sync');
  }
}

// Hook into saveState to auto-push
const _origSave = saveState;
saveState = function(){
  _origSave.call(this);
  if(settings.autoSync && settings.syncKey){
    clearTimeout(saveState._debounce);
    saveState._debounce = setTimeout(pushToGitHub, 1500);
  }
};

function resetData(){
  if(!confirm('Reset all data to original seed data? This cannot be undone.')) return;
  localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
  seedTasks(); renderAll();
  toast('Data reset to original','info');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  TOAST
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toast(msg, type='info'){
  const wrap = document.getElementById('toast-wrap');
  const el   = document.createElement('div');
  el.className = `toast ${type}`;
  el.textContent = msg;
  wrap.appendChild(el);
  setTimeout(() => { el.classList.add('toast-fade'); setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 350); }, 2800);
}

function showUndoToast(msg){
  const wrap = document.getElementById('toast-wrap');
  const el   = document.createElement('div');
  el.className = 'toast info';
  el.innerHTML = `<span style="flex:1">${msg}</span><button onclick="undoDelete(this)" style="background:none;border:1px solid var(--border3);color:var(--accent);padding:.2rem .6rem;border-radius:5px;font-size:.75rem;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif">Undo</button>`;
  wrap.appendChild(el);
  setTimeout(() => { el.classList.add('toast-fade'); setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 350); pendingDelete=null; }, 5000);
}

function undoDelete(btn){
  // Undo not fully implemented in this demo — tasks already removed
  // In production, keep a deletedTasks buffer
  btn.closest('.toast').remove();
  toast('Undo not available — task was already deleted','error');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  RENDER ALL
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderAll(){
  renderKPIs();
  renderDashboard();
  if(currentMachine) renderDetail();
  
  const pd = document.getElementById('print-date');
  if(pd) pd.textContent = 'Generated: ' + new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-PK', {day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'});
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  PWA MANIFEST
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function installPWA(){
  const m = {name:'Aerosol Plant Tracker',short_name:'Plant Tracker',
    theme_color:'#0d1117',background_color:'#0d1117',display:'standalone',
    start_url:'./',orientation:'any',
    icons:[{src:`data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'><rect width='100' height='100' rx='20' fill='%231f4e79'/><text y='.9em' font-size='70' x='15'>⚙️</text></svg>`,sizes:'192x192',type:'image/svg+xml'}]
  };
  const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(m)],{type:'application/json'});
  const link = document.createElement('link');
  link.rel='manifest'; link.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  document.head.appendChild(link);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  AUTH
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function loadUser(){
  try {
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY_USER);
    if(raw){
      currentUser = JSON.parse(raw);
      if(currentUser && currentUser.token){
        settings.syncKey = currentUser.token;
      }
    }
  } catch(e){ currentUser = null; }
}

function saveUser(){
  if(currentUser){
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY_USER, JSON.stringify(currentUser));
  } else {
    localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY_USER);
  }
}

function isLoggedIn(){ return currentUser && currentUser.token && currentUser.name; }

function attemptLogin(){
  const name = document.getElementById('login-name').value.trim();
  const token = document.getElementById('login-token').value.trim();
  if(!name){ toast('Please enter your display name','error'); return; }
  if(!token || !token.startsWith('ghp_')){ toast('Please enter a valid GitHub token (starts with ghp_)','error'); return; }
  
  currentUser = { name, token };
  settings.syncKey = token;
  saveUser();
  saveState();
  updateAuthUI();
  closeLoginModal();
  toast(`Welcome, ${name}! You can now edit tasks.`, 'success');
  setTimeout(pullFromGitHub, 500);
}

function logout(){
  if(!confirm('Log out? You will no longer be able to make edits.')) return;
  currentUser = null;
  settings.syncKey = '';
  saveUser();
  saveState();
  updateAuthUI();
  updateSyncUI();
  renderAll();
  toast('Logged out — read-only mode','info');
}

function handleAuthClick(){
  if(isLoggedIn()){
    logout();
  } else {
    openLoginModal();
  }
}

function openLoginModal(){
  document.getElementById('login-name').value = currentUser ? currentUser.name : '';
  document.getElementById('login-token').value = currentUser ? currentUser.token : (settings.syncKey || '');
  document.getElementById('login-close-btn').style.display = isLoggedIn() ? 'flex' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('login-modal').style.display = 'flex';
}

function closeLoginModal(){
  document.getElementById('login-modal').style.display = 'none';
}

function updateAuthUI(){
  const btn = document.getElementById('auth-btn');
  if(!btn) return;
  if(isLoggedIn()){
    btn.textContent = '👤';
    btn.title = `Logged in as ${currentUser.name} — click to logout`;
  } else {
    btn.textContent = '🔓';
    btn.title = 'Login to edit';
  }
  
  const authName = document.getElementById('auth-name');
  if(authName){
    authName.textContent = isLoggedIn() ? currentUser.name : 'Read-Only';
    authName.style.color = isLoggedIn() ? 'var(--s-cp-t)' : 'var(--text3)';
  }
  
  const editEls = document.querySelectorAll('.add-task-btn, .task-menu-btn, .btn-danger, #modal-delete-btn');
  editEls.forEach(el => {
    el.style.display = isLoggedIn() ? '' : 'none';
  });
  
  const dashAddBtn = document.querySelector('#view-dashboard .btn-sm.primary');
  if(dashAddBtn) dashAddBtn.style.display = isLoggedIn() ? '' : 'none';
  
  const banner = document.getElementById('readonly-banner');
  if(banner) banner.style.display = isLoggedIn() ? 'none' : 'block';
}

function logActivity(action){
  const who = isLoggedIn() ? currentUser.name : 'Anonymous';
  const entry = {time: new Date().toISOString(), action: `[${who}] ${action}`};
  activityLog.unshift(entry);
  if(activityLog.length > MAX_LOG) activityLog.length = MAX_LOG;
  try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY+'_log', JSON.stringify(activityLog)); } catch(e){}
}

function loadActivityLog(){
  try {
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY+'_log');
    if(raw) activityLog = JSON.parse(raw);
  } catch(e){ activityLog = []; }
}

function renderActivityLog(){
  const container = document.getElementById('activity-log-container');
  if(!container) return;
  if(!activityLog || !activityLog.length){
    container.innerHTML = `<div style="color:var(--text3);font-style:italic">No activity logged yet</div>`;
    return;
  }
  container.innerHTML = activityLog.map(entry => {
    const date = new Date(entry.time).toLocaleString('en-PK', {hour12:true, hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit', second:'2-digit', day:'numeric', month:'short'});
    return `<div style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding-bottom:.25rem;margin-bottom:.25rem">
      <span style="color:var(--text3)">[${date}]</span> ${escapeHTML(entry.action)}
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function escapeHTML(str){
  return str.replace(/&/g, "&amp;").replace(/</g, "&lt;").replace(/>/g, "&gt;").replace(/"/g, "&quot;").replace(/'/g, "&#039;");
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  BULK ACTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function handleCheckboxChange() {
  const bar = document.getElementById('bulk-action-bar');
  const countSpan = document.getElementById('bulk-count');
  if(!bar || !countSpan) return;
  
  const checked = document.querySelectorAll('.task-select-cb:checked');
  if(checked.length > 0) {
    countSpan.textContent = checked.length + ' selected';
    bar.style.display = 'flex';
  } else {
    bar.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

function clearSelection() {
  const checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll('.task-select-cb');
  checkboxes.forEach(cb => cb.checked = false);
  const bar = document.getElementById('bulk-action-bar');
  if(bar) bar.style.display = 'none';
}

function bulkUpdateStatus(status) {
  if(!isLoggedIn()) { openLoginModal(); return; }
  const checked = document.querySelectorAll('.task-select-cb:checked');
  if(!checked.length) return;
  
  const ids = Array.from(checked).map(cb => cb.dataset.id);
  const who = isLoggedIn() ? currentUser.name : 'Unknown';
  const updatedDate = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-PK', {day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'});
  
  let updatedCount = 0;
  ids.forEach(id => {
    const t = tasks.find(t => t.id === id);
    if(t) {
      t.status = status;
      if(status === 'Completed') t.progress = 100;
      t.lastEditedBy = who;
      t.updated = updatedDate;
      updatedCount++;
    }
  });
  
  if(updatedCount > 0) {
    logActivity(`Bulk updated ${updatedCount} tasks to status "${status}"`);
    saveState();
    clearSelection();
    renderAll();
    toast(`Bulk updated ${updatedCount} tasks to "${status}" ✓`, 'success');
  }
}

//  BOOT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ── THEME ──────────────────────────────────────────────
function openLightbox(src){
  const lb = document.getElementById('lightbox');
  const img = document.getElementById('lightbox-img');
  img.src = src;
  lb.style.display = 'flex';
}

function closeLightbox(){
  const lb = document.getElementById('lightbox');
  lb.style.display = 'none';
}

function applyTheme(t){
  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', t);
  const btn = document.getElementById('theme-btn');
  if(btn) btn.textContent = t === 'light' ? '🌙' : '☀️';
  btn && (btn.title = t === 'light' ? 'Switch to Dark Mode' : 'Switch to Light Mode');
}

function toggleTheme(){
  const current = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') || 'light';
  const next = current === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
  applyTheme(next);
  localStorage.setItem('aerosol_theme', next);
}

// Load saved theme before first paint
(function(){
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('aerosol_theme') || 'light';
  applyTheme(saved);
})();

installPWA();
loadUser();
loadState();
loadActivityLog();
renderAll();
updateAuthUI();
updateSyncUI();

// On boot, pull from GitHub if token is set
if(settings.syncKey){
  setTimeout(() => {
    pullFromGitHub();
  }, 800);
}

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if(e.key === 'Escape'){ 
    closeModal(); 
    closeCtx(); 
    closeLightbox(); 
    closeLoginModal(); 
    clearSelection();
  }
  if((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key.toLowerCase() === 'f'){
    const searchEl = document.getElementById('f-search');
    if(searchEl){
      e.preventDefault();
      searchEl.focus();
      searchEl.select();
    }
  }
});

window.addEventListener('beforeunload', (e) => {
  if(syncBusy){
    e.preventDefault();
    e.returnValue = 'Changes are still syncing to GitHub. Leave anyway?';
  }
});

// File input change preview handler
document.getElementById('f-image').addEventListener('change', function(e){
  const file = e.target.files[0];
  if(!file) {
    document.getElementById('f-image-preview').style.display = 'none';
    return;
  }
  const r = new FileReader();
  r.onload = ev => {
    document.getElementById('f-image-img').src = ev.target.result;
    document.getElementById('f-image-preview').style.display = 'block';
  };
  r.readAsDataURL(file);
});
</script>


<!-- Bulk Action Bar -->
<div id="bulk-action-bar" style="display:none; position:fixed; bottom:3rem; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg); padding:0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius:var(--radius-lg); z-index:100; gap:0.8rem; align-items:center; transition: all 0.2s ease;">
  <span id="bulk-count" style="font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--text2);">0 selected</span>
  <button class="btn-sm" onclick="bulkUpdateStatus('In Progress')" style="background:var(--s-ip-bg); color:var(--s-ip-t); border-color:var(--s-ip-b); font-size: 0.78rem; cursor: pointer; padding: .35rem .75rem; border-radius: 6px;">Mark In Progress</button>
  <button class="btn-sm" onclick="bulkUpdateStatus('Completed')" style="background:var(--s-cp-bg); color:var(--s-cp-t); border-color:var(--s-cp-b); font-size: 0.78rem; cursor: pointer; padding: .35rem .75rem; border-radius: 6px;">Mark Completed</button>
  <button class="btn-sm" onclick="clearSelection()" style="font-size: 0.78rem; cursor: pointer; padding: .35rem .75rem; border-radius: 6px;">Cancel</button>
</div>

<!-- Watermark removed -->

</body>
</html>

================
File: package.json
================
{
  "dependencies": {
    "xlsx": "^0.18.5"
  }
}

================
File: pull.bat
================
@echo off
echo Pulling latest changes from GitHub...
git pull
echo Done!
pause

================
File: push.bat
================
@echo off
echo Committing and pushing changes to GitHub...
git add .
git commit -m "Update Aerosol Tracker data"
git push
echo Done!
pause

================
File: README.md
================
# Aerosol Plant — Installation Tracker

Live progress tracker for Alpha Containers (Pvt.) Ltd. Aerosol Plant installation.

🔗 **Live App:** https://ckndr.github.io/Aerosol/aerosol_tracker.html

---

## ⚠️ Critical Rule for All Future AI Prompts
Before making any updates or modifying the codebase, **you MUST create a backup** of the current HTML file(s).
1. Copy `index.html` to a backup file (e.g., `index.html.bak` or `backups/index_YYYY_MM_DD.html`).
2. Copy `aerosol_tracker.html` to a backup file (e.g., `aerosol_tracker.html.bak`).
*This prevents accidental regression of features and makes rollback simple if any merging bugs occur.*

---

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `aerosol_tracker.html` | The full PWA application — open this in any browser (GitHub Pages main entry point) |
| `index.html` | Development / local testing copy of the app |
| `tasks.json` | Live task data — updated by the app via GitHub sync |
| `Aerosol Plant Project Tracker.xlsx` | Excel spreadsheet containing task source of truth |
| `push.bat` | Double-click to stage, commit, and push changes to GitHub |
| `pull.bat` | Double-click to pull latest updates from GitHub |

## Usage

- Open the live app link above on any phone or desktop
- On mobile: tap **Share → Add to Home Screen** to install as an app
- Edits sync to `tasks.json` in this repo automatically

## Sync Setup

1. Go to **Settings** inside the app
2. Paste your GitHub Personal Access Token
3. Toggle **Auto-sync on every save**
4. Any team member with the token can edit live data

================

================
